articles.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
articles.summary: The team behind Sora, a popular app, utilized Codex to successfully launch its Android version in just 28 days, demonstrating the power of AI-powered coding tools in rapid development. Codex, an AI model, helped automate coding tasks, allowing the team to focus on higher-level development and testing. This achievement showcases the potential of AI-driven development to accelerate app deployment and improve time-to-market.

articles.title: BNY builds “AI for everyone, everywhere” with OpenAI
articles.summary: BNY Mellon has partnered with OpenAI to develop an "AI for everyone, everywhere" platform, aiming to make artificial intelligence more accessible and inclusive. This collaboration will leverage OpenAI's technology to drive innovation and improve customer experiences across the financial services industry. The partnership is expected to have a significant impact on the adoption of AI in finance, making it more widely available and user-friendly.

articles.title: BBVA and OpenAI collaborate to transform global banking
articles.summary: BBVA has partnered with OpenAI to revolutionize global banking by leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning. This collaboration aims to enhance customer experiences, improve operational efficiency, and drive innovation in financial services. By integrating OpenAI's technology, BBVA seeks to stay at the forefront of the banking industry's digital transformation.

articles.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a cutting-edge AI model that promises to revolutionize science and math education by providing personalized learning experiences and advanced problem-solving capabilities. This innovative technology has the potential to enhance student understanding and engagement in complex subjects. With GPT-5.2, students can expect more accurate and efficient solutions to math and science problems, paving the way for a more effective learning process.

articles.title: Update to GPT-5 System Card: GPT-5.2
articles.summary: OpenAI has released an update to its GPT-5 system, introducing GPT-5.2, which is expected to bring significant improvements to the model's performance and capabilities. This update enhances the AI's ability to understand and generate human-like text, making it a more powerful tool for various applications. With GPT-5.2, users can anticipate more accurate and informative responses from the AI model.

articles.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
articles.summary: Google has upgraded its Gemini audio models, enabling more accurate and efficient voice recognition for a range of applications. This improvement paves the way for enhanced voice experiences, from virtual assistants to voice-controlled devices. With Gemini, developers can create more sophisticated and user-friendly voice interfaces, revolutionizing the way people interact with technology.

articles.title: Deepening our partnership with the UK AI Security Institute
articles.summary: A major tech company is strengthening its partnership with the UK AI Security Institute to advance AI security research and development. This collaboration aims to enhance the security and reliability of AI systems, addressing growing concerns around AI safety. The partnership is expected to drive innovation and foster a more secure AI ecosystem.

articles.title: Strengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
articles.summary: A major tech company has announced a strengthened partnership with the UK government to drive prosperity and security in the age of artificial intelligence. This collaboration aims to harness AI's potential to boost economic growth, improve public services, and enhance national security. The partnership will focus on developing and implementing AI solutions to address key challenges and opportunities in the UK.

articles.title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced the FACTS Benchmark Suite, a comprehensive tool for evaluating the factuality of large language models, enabling systematic assessment of their ability to provide accurate and reliable information. This suite aims to identify and address potential biases and inaccuracies in AI-generated content. By using FACTS, developers can refine their models to produce more trustworthy and factual outputs.

articles.title: Engineering more resilient crops for a warming climate
articles.summary: Scientists are developing more resilient crops to combat the impacts of climate change, using advanced engineering techniques to enhance their ability to withstand rising temperatures and extreme weather conditions. This innovation has the potential to improve global food security and reduce crop losses due to climate-related stress. By creating climate-resilient crops, researchers aim to ensure a more stable food supply for future generations.

articles.title: CUGA on Hugging Face: Democratizing Configurable AI Agents
articles.summary: Hugging Face has introduced CUGA, a platform that democratizes access to configurable AI agents, allowing users to easily create and customize their own AI models. This innovation enables developers to build tailored AI solutions without requiring extensive expertise, making AI more accessible and widespread. By lowering the barrier to entry, CUGA has the potential to accelerate AI adoption across various industries and applications.

articles.title: Nemotron 3 Nano \- A new Standard for Efficient, Open, and Intelligent Agentic Models
articles.summary: The Nemotron 3 Nano introduces a new standard for agentic models, prioritizing efficiency, openness, and intelligence. This innovative model enables more effective decision-making and problem-solving capabilities, making it a significant advancement in the field of artificial intelligence. By being open and accessible, Nemotron 3 Nano has the potential to accelerate development and collaboration in AI research.

articles.title: New in llama.cpp: Model Management
articles.summary: The latest update to llama.cpp introduces model management, allowing users to easily manage and switch between different AI models. This innovation enables more flexibility and customization, making it simpler to adapt the model to specific use cases and applications. By streamlining model management, llama.cpp enhances its overall usability and performance.

articles.title: Codex is Open Sourcing AI models
articles.summary: Codex, a leading AI developer, is open-sourcing its AI models, making it possible for the public to access and build upon its cutting-edge technology. This move is expected to accelerate innovation in the field of artificial intelligence and drive collaboration among developers. By sharing its models, Codex aims to democratize access to AI and foster a community-driven approach to AI development.

articles.title: Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker: Cost-efficient Frontier Multimodal Performance
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker, a cost-efficient AI model that achieves state-of-the-art performance in multimodal tasks, such as text, image, and audio processing. This innovation enables more efficient use of computational resources, making AI more accessible and affordable. By reducing costs, Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker has the potential to accelerate AI adoption across various industries and applications.

articles.title: Children with cancer scammed out of millions fundraised for their treatment
articles.summary: Scammers have been targeting fundraising campaigns for children with cancer, deceiving donors out of millions of dollars meant for life-saving treatments. These scams often use fake or manipulated stories and images to tug at donors' heartstrings, highlighting the need for vigilance when donating to online fundraising campaigns. The scams not only harm the intended recipients but also erode trust in legitimate fundraising efforts.

articles.title: Bonsai: A Voxel Engine, from scratch
articles.summary: Developers have created Bonsai, a voxel engine built from scratch, allowing for the rendering of 3D environments using voxels, which are 3D equivalents of pixels. This innovative engine has the potential to revolutionize game development and simulation software. By building Bonsai from the ground up, the creators have achieved impressive performance and flexibility in rendering complex voxel-based scenes.

articles.title: ArkhamMirror: Airgapped investigation platform with CIA-style hypothesis testing
articles.summary: ArkhamMirror is a novel airgapped investigation platform that enables CIA-style hypothesis testing, allowing researchers to analyze and investigate complex threats in a secure, isolated environment. This platform uses a unique approach to test hypotheses and identify potential security threats, mimicking the methods used by intelligence agencies. By providing a secure and controlled space for investigation, ArkhamMirror aims to enhance threat detection and response capabilities.

articles.title: JetBlue flight averts mid-air collision with US Air Force jet
articles.summary: A JetBlue flight recently avoided a mid-air collision with a US Air Force jet, highlighting the importance of advanced air traffic control systems. The close call was prevented by automatic collision avoidance systems, which alerted the pilots to take evasive action. This incident underscores the critical role of technology in ensuring aviation safety and preventing accidents.

articles.title: 8M users' AI conversations sold for profit by "privacy" extensions
articles.summary: A recent discovery revealed that certain "privacy" browser extensions have been secretly collecting and selling conversations between 8 million users and AI chatbots, compromising their personal data. This shocking breach of trust highlights the importance of thoroughly vetting extensions before installation. The incident raises concerns about the true intentions of some extensions that claim to prioritize user privacy.

articles.title: VS Code deactivates IntelliCode in favor of the paid Copilot
articles.summary: Microsoft's VS Code has replaced its free IntelliCode feature with the paid Copilot tool, marking a significant shift in its coding assistance offerings. This change may impact developers who rely on IntelliCode's AI-powered code completion and suggestions. The move is likely to drive adoption of Copilot, which offers more advanced features and capabilities for a subscription fee.

articles.title: Secret Documents Show Pepsi and Walmart Colluded to Raise Food Prices
articles.summary: Leaked documents have revealed a shocking collaboration between Pepsi and Walmart, allegedly working together to increase food prices and maximize profits. This collusion could have significant implications for consumers, potentially leading to higher grocery bills and reduced access to affordable food options. The exposure of this secret partnership may spark regulatory scrutiny and calls for greater transparency in the food industry.
